MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lisa L. Oberg of McKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE (415-267-4175), appearing for defendant / moving party Metalclad Insulation Corporation
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Aubrey Matthews

RULING:
DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 1 and 2 (general negligence excluding negligent failure to warn, strict liability design and manufacturing defect), denied as to issue 4 (punitive damages) and taken off calendar as to issue 3 (false representation). Defendant satisfied its burden of production of making a prima facie case that it is entitled to prevail on its government contractor defense as to non-duty to warn claims and plaintiff has not presented admissible evidence creating a triable issue on this defense. As to punitive damages, defendant failed to sustain its burden of production that plaintiff does not now possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant punitive damages. Plaintiff's responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Plaintiff represents that he is dismissing his false representation cause of action. Order signed in open court. The Court will rule on plaintiff's evidentiary objections. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
